generated_parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

requirements: Structures: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path
Load Path Continuity: Transfers lift and landing loads from wingtips to fuselage frames.
Thermal Dissipation: Dissipates heat from sun-exposed areas towards cooler wing roots.
Anti-Rotation: Prevents rotation between two halves of the spar during flight.

verify.rule: Each required evidence_feature must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.
cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.
Each physical feature must include args.at [x,y,z] and real dimensions.

verify.value: Interfaces named with exact neighboring subsystem labels.
verify.rule: Name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate.
Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment due to complex assembly order.
risk.mit: Review and optimize assembly sequence.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure if load path is compromised.
risk.mit: Conduct thorough static and fatigue testing.

risk.desc: Inconsistent tolerancing may affect fit and function.
risk.mit: Standardize tolerance across all parts.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance in snap-fit interfaces could cause binding.
risk.mit: Increase clearance in snap-fit interfaces.

risk.desc: Potential for thermal expansion issues if not accounted for.
risk.mit: Include thermal expansion allowances in design.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path

physics_paths.description: Transfers lift and landing loads from wingtips to fuselage frames.
Dissipates heat from sun-exposed areas towards cooler wing roots.
Prevents rotation between two halves of the spar during flight.

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads
manufacturing_strategy.support_orientation: Support structures oriented for easy removal
manufacturing_strategy.inspection_implications: Visual inspection for alignment and fit

verification_focus.description: Ensure the spar does not exceed 250g to maintain overall vehicle weight.
Verify spar can withstand expected loads without failure.

requirements: Provide structural support and airfoil section for fixed-wing flying-wing UAV.

verify.rule: Ensure all specified evidence_features and internal_features are included.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to material mismatch between EPP foam core and CFRP spar.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal cycling tests to validate material compatibility.

risk.desc: Risk of improper alignment during assembly if spar sockets are not clearly marked.
risk.mit: Add visual indicators on spar sockets for easy identification.

risk.desc: Possibility of control surface jamming if hinge clearance is insufficient.
risk.mit: Ensure sufficient clearance around hinge line to prevent jamming.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure if load paths are not continuous from wing skin to fuselage.
risk.mit: Verify continuous load paths through spar to fuselage frames.

risk.desc: Potential for increased weight if lightening pockets are not optimally placed.
risk.mit: Optimize placement of lightening pockets to minimize weight without compromising strength.

physics_paths.description: Transfers aerodynamic lift and drag forces from wing skin to central spar.
Heat dissipation from sun exposure through EPP foam core.
Allows control surface deflection via hinge line.

verification_focus.description: Ensures the wing rib set meets weight budget constraints.
Verifies the wing rib set can withstand expected aerodynamic loads.
Confirms the wing rib set maintains optimal temperature under sun exposure.
